title: Bundle Optimization & Store Prep (< 2.5 MB, screenshots, CWS dev submit)
description: Final Phase 1 milestone. Tasks: (1) run Vite bundle analysis, enforce < 2.5 MB total; (2) tree-shake shadcn/ui — only used components; (3) dynamic-import ML modules; (4) verify int8-quantised ONNX model size; (5) generate Chrome Web Store assets: 5 screenshots (1280×800), 440×280 promo tile, store description; (6) draft privacy policy and host at public URL; (7) penetration-test storage encryption (ciphertext audit); (8) complete CWS developer checklist; (9) submit to CWS dev channel. Coverage floor rises to 90% in this PR (or confirmed path to 90%).
